_readme: Stone Saga token pip data. Each material has a list of valid orientations. Each orientation is [leftColor, leftCount, rightColor, rightCount]. Use null for null icons (count 0, only valid in last column of a pair = right edge of right-hand token).
_example_check: Wood (hardened) + Feather orientation [Blue,2,Red,1] × [Red,1,Blue,0] => inner Red=Red match, code Blue 2210. Matches rulebook.
